Utility project

Automated Morning and Night Greets

A small personal automation that turns a recurring task into a lightweight, usable iOS workflow.

What it is

A small automation project built to remove a recurring manual task.

This shortcut schedules a recurring message so the task stops depending on memory and repetition. It is a small project, but it reflects the same instinct toward usable workflows and low-overhead automation that shows up in larger systems work.

How to use the shortcut

iOS setup

  • Install Apple Shortcuts on your device if it is not already available.
  • Add the shortcut from one of the links below.
  • Create a Personal Automation in Shortcuts and choose the trigger you want.
  • Turn off “Ask Before Running” if you want it to fire automatically.
  • Update the recipient at the end of the shortcut before using it.

Good Morning Texter Shortcut

Good Night Texter Shortcut

Edwin Tse

I build data systems and reporting workflows that make day-to-day work easier to read, trust, and use.

Outside work I keep coming back to transit systems, public infrastructure, fairness questions, and small automation tools that remove repeat friction.
